center.name: 苏昆比奥斯省
center.summary: 苏昆比奥斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括粉髯林蜂鸟、橙頂侏儒鳥、Fulvous-breasted flatbill等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: napoensis is found in southern Colombia's Putumayo Department and in Ecuador's Sucumbíos and Napo provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Separate populations are found in northern Sucumbíos Province in northeastern Ecuador and in southern Loreto Province in northeastern Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The last is found from Sucumbíos Province in far northern Ecuador south along the eastern slope of the Andes through Peru and into northwestern Bolivia as far as Cochabamba Department. The fulvous-breasted flatbill inhabits the interior and edges of humid to wet foothill and montane forests and secondary forest in the foothill and subtropical zones

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lunulated antbird is found in eastern Ecuador from Sucumbíos Province to Morona-Santiago Province and in northern and central Peru west of the Rio Napo and Rio Ucayali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The others are found in the Serranía del Darién and Santander department, south on the west slope of the Andes into Ecuador as far as El Oro Province, and on the east slope of the Andes from Sucumbíos Province in Ecuador south into northern Peru's Cajamarca and Amazonas departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A third is found in Sucumbíos and northern Orellana provinces of northeastern Ecuador, the northeastern quadrant of Peru, and slightly into far western Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-crested manakin primarily is found in eastern Ecuador between Sucumbíos and Pastaza provinces and southeast well into northern Peru's Loreto Department. In Peru it is found mostly north of the Amazon River but has a few localities south of it.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cleavesi is found in the Andes of northeastern Ecuador between Sucumbíos and Morona-Santiago provinces
